title: viola × dissita
intro: Viola × dissita, also known as the hybrid viola or hybrid pansy, is a natural hybrid of the viola species, exhibiting characteristics of its parent plants. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Viola × dissita include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Viola × dissita can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including colds, flu, and skin irritations.
